programme.title: A Screw Loose-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Survivalists Leah and Caesar are tested by a painful leg injury in the Mayan jungle. S09 E02.

programme.title: Swamp Queen-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Gabrielle tackles a 21-day ordeal in Mississippi's serpent-infested marshes. S09 E03.

programme.title: Pick Your Poison-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists attempt to survive in Brazil for 21 days with no food, water or clothes. S09 E10.

programme.title: Loaded for Bear-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: In Tennessee's Smoky Mountains, survivalists compete with black bears for resources. S09 E09.

programme.title: Category 5 Survival-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on the swamps of Florida to survive for 21 days with no resources. S09 E01.

programme.title: Boars and Prehistoric Fish-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario returns to his Australia to assist a friend and to catch some prehistoric fish. S01 E07.

programme.title: Succession-Gold Rush
programme.desc: The Beets family implodes trying to get the Paradise Hill trommel running. S14 E15.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programme.title: Vicky Kaushal-Into The Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes Vicky Kaushal on an adventure into the depths of the Indian Ocean. S02 E02.

programme.title: Mexico-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Mexico's Copper Canyon. S01 E12.

programme.title: Volcanic Kingfish-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S01 E05.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters: Red Stag-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S01 E06.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: David races to acquire his cargo from Delhi to Bengaluru and uncovers India as he travels.

programme.title: Texas Hog and Beautyberry-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S02 E02.

programme.title: Black Bear & Wild Rice-WildFed
programme.desc: The host searches for wild ingredients and turns them into gourmet meals for loved ones. S01 E01.

programme.title: Waterfalls Of Bihar
programme.desc: The host explores Bihar's flowing waters that shape forests, cliffs, and ancient terrains. S01 E01.

programme.title: Waterfalls Of Bihar
programme.desc: The host explores how waterfalls sustain ecosystems and preserve biodiversity. S01 E02.

programme.title: Ethiopia-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed visits the Hamar cattle herders of Ethiopia to witness a unique rite of passage. S01 E01.

programme.title: North Africa-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is stranded in Northern Africa and gets jugaad in finding water, food and a shelter. S04 E13.

programme.title: Borneo Jungle-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear must descend dangerous cliffs and deal with heavy rain to survive in a Borneo jungle. S06 E04.

programme.title: Exploring The Unknown With Wang Yibo
programme.desc: Chinese actor and singer Wang Yibo undertakes outdoor adventures in extreme environments.

programme.title: Out of the Ashes Part One-Dual Survival
programme.desc: On the slopes of a volcano, Matt and Joe struggle to navigate their way towards the coast. S05 E06.

programme.title: Patagonia-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: In the icy weather of Patagonia, the host demonstrates how to build a snow cave. S02 E05.

programme.title: Ecuador-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed travels to the heart of the Ecuadorian rainforest to live with the Waorani. S01 E05.

programme.title: Red Rock Country-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is in the red rock canyons of southern Utah where he descends a major rock pinnacle. S07 E04.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Buddha Relics
programme.desc: The exploration of the history and importance of the Buddha's artefacts, is presented.

programme.title: Terror in Tanzania-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: EJ Snyder and Kellie Nightlinger attempt to survive the African Serengeti for 21 days. S01 E02.

programme.title: Punishment in Panama-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Clint Jivoin and Laura Zerra must survive a tropical hell on an island in Panama for 21 days. S01 E04.

programme.title: Island From Hell-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists are stranded on a deserted island for 21 days with no food and water. S01 E03.
